problem_domain: Enterprise governance and control for AI-assisted software delivery workflows.

demand_signals.signal: Growing enterprise concern about unmanaged AI changes in delivery pipelines.
demand_signals.evidence_note: Repeated governance concerns appear in engineering-lead conversations.

market_trends.trend: AI-assisted engineering adoption is expanding into production-affecting workflows.
market_trends.impact_note: Governance and audit needs increase as deployment scope broadens.

tam_sam_som.estimation_note: Illustrative top-down estimate for governed AI delivery software in target segments.

opportunity_summary: There is a credible emerging opportunity for governed AI-delivery infrastructure aimed at organizations that value auditability, policy control, and operational discipline over pure generation speed.
